title: Middle Eastern-Style Goose Kebabs
description: Marinated goose kebabs grilled to perfection and served with a side of tzatziki sauce.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, paprika, cumin, salt, and black pepper.
2. Add the goose cubes to the marinade and mix well to coat.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
5. Thread the marinated goose cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
6. Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the goose is cooked through.
7. Transfer the kebabs to a plate and let rest for 5 minutes.
8. Meanwhile, grill the sliced red onion and bell pepper for 2-3 minutes per side, or until tender.
9. Serve the kebabs with the grilled vegetables and tzatziki sauce (store-bought or homemade).
